mainText: Today's top stories: Cursor announces its own AI model, a new, ByteDance's Seedance 2.5 breaks the 30-second barrier, Mistral's new OCR model beats competitors in 72, Claude Tag embeds Anthropic's AI in Slack, already, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, Anthropic drops ‘workplace AI agents’ directly inside Slack, China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center, There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark
